title: Hewlett Packard Stock Rises on Upbeat Results
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co (NYSE:HPE) was one of the names reporting earnings after the close yesterday, with its fiscal fourth-quarter profits of 57 cents per share barely beating analysts' estimates, while revenue of $7.87 billion outperformed the anticipated $7.42 billion.

title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates, Sales Top
text: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) Q4 results reflect the benefits of the increased demand for its products and services, primarily driven by the accelerated digital transformation amid the hybrid working trend.

title: Market Volatility Eases Slightly Following Hopes Of China COVID-19 Policy Change - Hewlett Packard (NYSE:HPE), Amazon.com (NASDAQ:AMZN)
text: US stocks closed mostly lower on Tuesday with markets awaiting guidance on the Federal Reserve's rate increase strategy. US oil futures closed higher in the prior session on hopes that China would loosen its strict covid-19 restrictions that had raised concerns over the worldwide economic growth.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE ) Q4 2022 Results Conference Call November 29, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Jeff Kvaal - VP, IR Antonio Neri - President and CEO Tarek Robbiati - EVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Kyle McNealy - Jefferies Shannon Cross - Credit Suisse Simon Leopold - Raymond James Samik Chatterjee - JP Morgan Toni Sacconaghi - Bernstein Aaron Rakers - Wells Fargo Amit Daryanani - Evercore Operator Good day, and welcome to the Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2022 Hewlett Packard Enterprise Earnings Conference Call. My name is Chuck, and I'll be your conference moderator for today's call.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Meets Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: HP Enterprise (HPE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 6.12%, respectively, for the quarter ended October 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: HPE's stock surges on record sales, strong revenue guidance
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co.'s stock was initially up 7% in extended trading Tuesday after the company reported quarterly results in line with analysts' estimates and offered strong revenue guidance.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Reports Fiscal 2022 Results with Record Q4 Performance

title: Hewlett Packard Q4 Preview: Can Shares Stay Hot?
text: Over the last month, HPE shares have continued to outperform the market, up more than 15%.

title: US tech giant Hewlett Packard plans up to 6,000 job cuts
text: PC-maker Hewlett Packard on Tuesday said it would layoff as many as 6,000 employees over the next three years as the slumping world economy continues to embroil the US tech sector.

title: HPE Asset Upcycling Services Chosen by Yahoo! JAPAN for Sustainable Reuse of IT Assets
text: TOKYO--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Yahoo! JAPAN has chosen HPE Asset Upcycling Services to ensure end-of-use hardware gets refurbished and reused wherever possible, to meet its sustainability goals.

title: Hewlett Packard: Like I Said, The Upside Does Exist - It's A 'Buy'
text: I've written about Hewlett Packard a few times, and I intend to continue covering what I view as one of the more undervalued plays in the sector here. The company still has an upside to a fair value, and that's what I look for when I invest in things.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise to Present Live Audio Webcast of Fiscal 2022 Fourth Quarter Earnings Conference Call
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) will conduct a live audio webcast of its conference call to review its financial results for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2022, which ended October 31, 2022. The call is scheduled for Tuesday, November 29, at 4:00 p.m. CT (5:00 p.m. ET), and the webcast will be available at www.hpe.com/investor/2022Q4Webcast. A replay of the audio webcast will be available at the same website shortly after the call and will remain available for approximately one year. About Hewlett Packard Enterprise Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) is the global edge-to-cloud company that helps organizations accelerate outcomes by unlocking value from all of their data, everywhere. Built on decades of reimagining the future and innovating to advance the way people live and work, HPE delivers unique, open and intelligent technology solutions as a service. With offerings spanning Cloud Services, Compute, High Performance Computing & AI, Intelligent Edge, Software, and Storage, HPE provides a consistent experience across all clouds and edges, helping customers develop new business models, engage in new ways, and increase operational performance. For more information, visit: www.hpe.com.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Introduces Next-Generation Compute Engineered for a Hybrid World
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced a next generation compute portfolio that delivers a cloud operating experience designed to power hybrid environments and digital transformation.
